sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93148" key="salia=|" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σαλιᾷ</orth> (or <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σάλω</orth>), <sense id="n93148.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀρκεῖ</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1654.tlg001:22" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Rhinth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">22</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
